title: 瑞玛丽
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2025/9/22/185745.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2025/9/22/506910.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"瑞玛丽"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者瑞玛丽，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"群星会春日厅的执司，兼任告解使与处刑者双重身份:忠诚于群星会枢机理事芙蕾雅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"气质端庄、圣洁，作为群星会中最知名的「告解使」她为试图得到「回声」指引的异格者解读「回声」，并倾听他们的烦恼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在进行告解工作时，她温柔且极具耐心，只要对方还有被拯救的可能，就会尽己所能地开导、疏解对方的心结，引导他们走向正途。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当她遇见执迷不悟、无法以言语劝导的恶徒时，内心潜藏的处刑使人格就会出现。作为处刑者，亲手为那些十恶不赦的罪人送葬。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在执行清理群星会叛徒的任务时，她会主动将身体的控制权交给处刑使人格。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"平日里，她则安安静静地坐在告解室内，极少有人知道她的另一面。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"或许这样的人格存在有些不可思议，但她的确是个很好的倾听者。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"恒定"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/9/22/447512.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"群星会"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"解罪女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"春日厅执司"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"/"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13653ada819cf","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"ReA芯片状态"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"正常"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":130,"height":184},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.game
